name: Brie Topped with Blueberry Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the chutney in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Boil for 1 minute, then remove the cinnamon stick.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 30 to 45 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake the brie on an ungreased cookie sheet for 10 to 12 minutes, or until soft.
7. Place the baked brie on a serving plate.
8. Top with the cold chutney and serve with a very mild-flavored cracker.
